presentation.executive_summary: Source authority and quality posture are shown per system without inferring final outcomes from non-authoritative data.
presentation.comparison_label: Comparison baseline unavailable in fixture preview
presentation.source_authority_explanation: Stay.ai is the source of truth for final subscription state and outcome confirmation.
presentation.trust_explanation: Trust labels are system-calculated from confirmation and data-quality status and are not manual.
presentation.freshness_explanation: Source freshness is evaluated independently per source system.
presentation.drilldown_hint: Use the sources list for lineage and missing-field diagnostics per source.
